name: Portfolio About
description: Bio, skills, and contact pages for a personal portfolio. Professional yet personal presentation with skill badges and a contact form.

page_briefs.about: Brand hero with a strong personal photo, concise bio text, and a CTA to view work or get in touch. Clean layout with confident typography. Personal but professional tone.
page_briefs.skills: Icon card grid displaying skill areas. Each card has an icon, skill name, and brief proficiency description. Cards are grouped by category (design, development, tools, etc.).
page_briefs.contact-page: Clean contact form with name, email, and message fields. Optional social links displayed alongside. Minimal and inviting, encouraging visitors to reach out.

shells.top-nav-main: Fixed top navigation bar with main content area below
